descriptions.about: Who I am and what I do

unknownCommand: Command not found: <cmd>{{input}}</cmd>. Type <help>help</help> to see available commands.
bio: Full-stack engineer building AI-powered data products for fintech.
Specializing in RAG systems, agentic AI integrations, and production deployments across React, Python, and AWS — taking projects from architecture to deployment.

experience.description: Building RAG-based search systems and automated reporting tools for institutional clients in financial analytics.
Built real-time charting platforms and embeddable widget systems.
Taking on select freelance projects for clients who need reliable, polished web products.

projectDescriptions.exante: RAG-based search for proprietary financial datasets
projectDescriptions.marketreader: Real-time interactive charting for financial data
projectDescriptions.freelanceros: All-in-one platform for freelancers — invoicing, projects, clients
